title: What self-control actually is
caption:
Self-control isn't about gritting your teeth. It's about being governed.

Most men treat it like willpower: try harder, hold the line, white-knuckle it until something breaks. But Scripture calls it the fruit of the Spirit — something grown, not forced. You're not fighting your impulses alone.

It's not suppression. It's sovereignty. It's a direction, not a fence. It's trained, not inherited. And the governed man — the one who doesn't run himself — is the only one who can be trusted with anything else.

"For the Spirit God gave us does not make us timid, but gives us power, love and self-discipline." — 2 Timothy 1:7

Save this for the brother who's been trying harder instead of growing deeper.

#faith #christianmen #selfcontrol #scripture #godlymen #manofgod #2timothy #discipleship
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
